name: Ankit Parmar
bio: Ankit is the life of the party who loves making people smile and bringing great energy wherever he goes.
funfact: Effortlessly spreads joy and keeps the vibe upbeat.

name: Arpita Doshatti
bio: Arpita is a people-loving soul who enjoys meaningful conversations, building connections, and spreading extra cheer during Christmas

name: Ashish Kumar
bio: A chill and supportive manager who loves building long-term relationships and keeping both teams and customers happy along the way.

name: Jose Leitao
bio: Jose is a board game and LEGO enthusiast whose mind works like a pro data architect.
funfact: Loves minimalism. Connects pieces seamlessly to create smart, scalable solutions.

name: Piyush Bansal
bio: Piyush may look serious at first, but he’s actually super warm and easygoing. His mind works in perfect chronological order, forgets nothing, and he’s amazing at what he does.
funfact: literally remembers everything, like a human timeline 😄

name: Vera Oliveira
bio: Vera is simply wonderful, a genuinely kind human who treats everyone warmly, excels at what she does, and always carries a smile.
funfact: Kindness, positivity, and good vibes all the way.

name: Rahul Nagpal
bio: Rahul is a book lover and an absolute sweetheart who enjoys meaningful conversations
funfact: Always there with kind words and the right vibe.
